diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 2462f5a..02605ff 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -60,2 +60,8 @@ Week 8 / day 49 observations:
 - New enterprise lead is E3, 831 seats, network-sourced. Current E3 C quality is 0.645 vs noisy q_min estimate ~0.668. Sent a low C offer at $79/seat with temporary C tier 5 during response, then restored C tier 4.
 - Week 8 priority: preserve runway. Reduce ads and dev sharply while keeping support high enough and pushing E3 over quality threshold.
+
+Week 9 / day 56 observations:
+- Week 8 added 704 individual subscribers, but cancellations rose to 21 and cash is down to $225k. Active individual MRR is about $170k/mo.
+- E3 Plan C now clears the estimated floor (0.6799 vs ~0.668). There are two open E3 threads: 7133 for 831 seats and 7766 for 371 seats. Sent clean C-only offers: $79/seat to 7133 and $89/seat to 7766.
+- Support is starting to age: two S2 issues are open for 4 days. Increase S2 ops again and slow ads further until aged backlog clears.
+- Week 9 needs cash protection: minimal dev, lower ads, high enough support, and watch enterprise responses closely.
